allow: PowerShell($body = '{"username": "testuser3", "password": "test123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"username": "testuser3", "password": "test123"}'; $token = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "TOKEN: $token"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/get1" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" } -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "GET /api/get1: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content\)")
